ingredients_text: Cooked Rice (54%) (White Rice); Chilli Con Carne (46%) (Minced Beef, Red Kidney Beans, Tomato, Onion, Water, Tomato Paste, Red Pepper, Green Pepper, Rapeseed Oil, Brown Sugar, Beef Stock Powder (Sugar, Salt, Natural Flavouring, Yeast Extract, Sunflower Oil, Beef Extract Powder), Salt, Modified Maize Starch, Ground Cumin, Chilli, Garlic Powder, Colour: Plain Caramel, Red Chilli Flakes).
